name: kreuzberg-cloud
description: Offload document extraction to api.kreuzberg.dev — managed extraction with webhooks, presigned uploads, and usage tracking.

interface.shortDescription: Managed cloud extraction with webhooks and presigned uploads
interface.longDescription: Offload extraction to api.kreuzberg.dev. Authenticate with a bearer API key, push large files through presigned uploads, poll job status or receive webhook callbacks, and track per-project usage against your quota. Sandbox keys are available for evaluation without signup.
defaultPrompt: Extract this PDF in the cloud
